name: Eternal love
overview: This show will feature the love stories unfolding among a group of participants living together 24/7. Expect to see love, jealousy, emotional highs, and all the twists and turns of their relationships.

trailers.title: عشق ابدی از ۸ اردیبهشت شروع می شود! | Eshghe Abadi - عشق ابدی
